name: Laravel / PHP
description: PHP 8 + Laravel idioms, Pest testing, and the artisan/deploy commands. Recommends Laravel Boost so the agent gets version-aware docs + app introspection.
detect: composer.json requires laravel/framework, or an artisan file is present

recommends.name: laravel/boost
recommends.install: composer require laravel/boost --dev && php artisan boost:install
recommends.why: Official Laravel MCP server: version-aware docs search + live app introspection (routes, DB schema, tinker, logs). Let the agent use it instead of guessing framework facts.
